news.t: BlackRock Expands Investor Access to International Equities with New Active ETF

holdings.infoBox: BIDD is an equity ETF with a total of 78 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 7.67%, SK hynix at 3.69%, ASM International NV at 3.54%, Tencent Holdings at 3.41%, and Samsung Electronics at 3.15%.

overview.description: The iShares International Dividend Active ETF (BIDD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in companies outside the US that are identified to pay attractive and growing dividends. BIDD was launched on Nov 15, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock Expands Investor Access to International Equities with New Active ETF
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, BlackRock announced the successful conversion of the BlackRock International Dividend Fund into an active ETF, creating the BlackRock International Dividend ETF (NYSE...
